statement: An append-only telemetry event log keyed by run/window/request/custom_key will materially improve causal ordering and root-cause diagnosis over current mutable-state-only observability.
rationale: Current architecture has stage ordering and status tables but lacks persistent event transitions.
keyAssumptions: Telemetry events are emitted at orchestration choke points.
Event volume remains manageable with bounded taxonomy.
validationCriteria: Given a run_id, agent can reconstruct ordered lifecycle without reading raw logs.
At least 80% of failure investigations can be resolved from telemetry queries.
critiquePoints: Some ordering is already inferable through existing fields and creation times.
questions: Should parent-child retry lineage be in events only or also in llm_requests schema?
